word: H1523 - גִּיל - gîyl - gheel - Be glad

sections.paragraph:
Original: גּוּל גּיל

Transliteration: gı̂yl gûl

Phonetic: gheel

BDB Definition:

  1. to rejoice, exult, be glad
    1. (Qal)
      1. to rejoice
      2. to tremble (from fear)

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 346

Part(s) of speech: Verb
